disambiguated.context: Two people got into a car accident at the corner today, one of the drivers was a 22-year-old and the other driver a 45-year-old. The 45-year-old had been going 55mph in a 30mph zone and wasn't able to stop in time to avoid hitting the 22-year-old when he came to a full stop at the stop sign.
